body_fields.name: content
body_fields.description: Skill markdown content. Frontmatter is optional on input and will be normalized on write.

body_fields.name: created_by
body_fields.description: Optional creator descriptor such as user:gary or agent:codex-01 via ASE-42.

body_fields.name: description
body_fields.description: Optional description used when the input content does not declare one.

body_fields.name: is_enabled
body_fields.description: Whether the new skill should be enabled for runtime injection immediately.

body_fields.name: name
body_fields.description: Project-unique skill name in the control plane.

body_fields.name: adapter_type
body_fields.description: Agent adapter type used to derive the runtime skill directory.

body_fields.name: workflow_id
body_fields.description: Optional workflow ID used to project only the currently bound enabled skills.

body_fields.name: workspace_root
body_fields.description: Workspace repository root that owns the agent skill directory.

body_fields.name: content
body_fields.description: Replacement skill markdown content. Frontmatter is optional on input and will be normalized on write.

body_fields.name: description
body_fields.description: Optional description override used when the input content does not declare one.

body_fields.description: Workflow IDs that should bind or unbind this skill.
